name: Forma
description: A Catholic UI Kit and design system for shared digital form, beauty, and usability.

components.name: Badge
components.description: A compact status, rank, or category label.

components.name: LiturgicalDayCard
components.description: Displays the liturgical day, season, rank, color, and readings.

components.name: MassScheduleBlock
components.description: Displays Mass times with today, Sunday, weekday, language, exception, and last-updated states.

components.name: BiblePassageCard
components.description: Displays a Bible passage with citation, translation, and actions.

components.name: ChurchDocumentHeader
components.description: Displays title, issuing authority, document type, date, and citation metadata.

components.name: SourceCard
components.description: Displays a Catholic source, authority level, relationships, and citations.

components.name: OntologyClassCard
components.description: Displays an ontology class, namespace, properties, and review status.
